IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: Direct the educational and philanthropic activities of the combined chapters of EPSILON SIGMA ALPHA INTERNATIONAL COUNCIL.
IRS990.MissionDesc: To support the educational and philanthropic activities of the combined chapters of EPSILON SIGMA ALPHA INTERNATIONAL COUNCIL by Bringing Good People Together to do Good Deeds for Others.
IRS990.Desc: Educational and philanthropic activities of the combined chapters of EPSILON SIGMA ALPHA INTERNATIONAL COUNCIL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S PURPOSE IS TO SUPPORT EDUCATIONAL AND PHILANTHROPIC ACTIVITIES OF TEH COMBINED CHPATERS. FOR FUNDS GIVEN TO AFFILIATED CHAPTER ORGANIZATIONS, NO FURTHER FOLLOW-UP IS DEEMED NECESSARY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT HAVE A FORMAL WRITTEN POLICY ON HOW IT WILL REVIEW THE FORM 990.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION MAKES ITS GOVERNING DOCUMENTS AND FINANCIAL INFORMATION AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

DisregardedEntityName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: EPSILON SIGMA ALPHA INT'L COUNCIL DISASTER FUND

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine2Txt: Z639 WA PAST ST PRESIDENTS AUX PALS
Z624 GAVELETTES GA PAST STATE PRES
Z628 VA ST PAST PRESIDENTS AUX

ReasonableCauseExplanation.ExplanationTxt: THIS RETURN WAS FILING VIA USPS IN A TIMELY MANNER. HOWEVER, WE WERE UNAWARE THAT RETURNS FOR PERIODS ENDING JULY 31, 2020, OUR EXACT FISCAL YEAR END, WERE REQUIRED TO BE FILED ELECTRONCIALLY. WE RECEIVED NOTICE FROM FOR THE SAME PROBLEM FOR A RELATED ORGANIZATION AND IMMEDIATELY WENT TO WORK TO REFILE ALL RETURNS ELECTRONICALLY AND THIS ONE IS THE SECOND WE'VE TAKEN THE INITIATIVE, WITHOUT NOTICE FROM THE IRS, AND FILED IT ELECTRONICALLY AS WELL. WE ARE WORKING DILIGENTLY TO GET BACK INTO COMPLIANCE AND WOULD HATE TO SEE THE GOOD WORKS OF SO MANY DEDICATED VOLUNTEERS GET INTERRUPTED. PLEASE, FOR THE SAKE OF THE ENTIRE ORGANIZATION, LET US DO WHATEVER IS NECESSARY TO GET BACK INTO COMPLIANCE. WE WILL DO WHATEVER IT TAKES. THANK YOU FOR YOUR CONSIDERATION!
